value.description: Submitted value; surfaced through the registration record.

disabled.description: When true, the item is skipped by arrow keys and cannot be activated.

description.description: Optional secondary text shown below the main label.

accessibleLabel.description: Accessible name for the option when the rendered row contains secondary text or rich content.

selectionMode.description: The item owns activation. This is the default CommandPalette mode.

unsupportedProps.name: leading
unsupportedProps.description: Leading content (icon, avatar). Rendered with aria-hidden.

unsupportedProps.name: onselect
unsupportedProps.description: Invoked when the item is activated inside CommandPalette.

unsupportedProps.name: trailing
unsupportedProps.description: Trailing content (kbd hint, badge). Rendered with aria-hidden.
